heading_content_part: Ursa Games privacy policy – Ursa Games Privacy policySkip to contentUrsa Games Privacy policyUrsa Games privacy policyUrsa Games and its games and other applications (“we,” “our” or “us”) believe that your privacy is very important. This Policy outlines the types data that we will collect from you through the various games and applications we provide (“Apps”). Your installation and/or use of these Apps and/or submission of information to us constitute your consent to this Privacy Policy. This Privacy Policy is effective as of March 29, 2014 and was last modified on july 23, 2019.
